The JUIT Alumni Cell (JAC) is dedicated to being there for every phase of these journeys in ways were never been before. As we know, Alumni are those pillars which form the backbone of any University. They not only depict the past but pave the way for the present and future batches. Over the years, JUIT has produced successful engineers who have not only adapted themselves to indifferent roles across various organizations but also written their own success stories as entrepreneurs. JAC creates and maintains a lifelong connection between the Institute and its alumni, who number more than 5,000. In collaboration with extremely dedicated volunteers, the Alumni Cell works to connect alumni, support students and build an unforgettable Institute experience through a diversity of events, programming and services. The Cell endeavours to maintain student’s portal, update the Alumni database, interact with them through Facebook page, Alma Connect, and Instagram and send out important updates. Vision and Mission: The mission of the Cell is to foster strong bonds between alumni, students and the Institute, to keep alumni informed, and to create a network enabling them to remain engaged with their alma mater and help shape it.
